# RRN Glass Tab

> A glassy new tab dashboard with a live clock, universal search, editable shortcuts, animated backgrounds, and custom photo imports. Installable as a Chrome, Edge, and Brave extension.

## Pages

- [Home](/): The new tab dashboard — clock, search bar, shortcuts, and animated background presets.
- [Customize your Chrome new tab page](/guides/customize-chrome-new-tab): Step-by-step guide to personalizing your browser start page with Glass Tab.
